# STRAT.023 ? Maslow's Hierarchy

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks
**Domain:** PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Needs hierarchy (physiological, safety, love/belonging, esteem, self-actualization); lower needs first; growth vs deficiency needs

## Application
Address basic needs first; recognize current need level; understand motivation; support progression up hierarchy; growth orientation

## Key Values
- Need hierarchy
- Progressive fulfillment
- Basic first
- Growth orientation
- Self-actualization

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, psychological_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
